title: Chemical Equilibrium and Le Chatelier's Principle
content: A reversible reaction at equilibrium shifts to oppose external perturbations in temperature, pressure, or concentration. Quantified by the van't Hoff equation: d(ln K)/dT = ΔH°/(RT²). Temperature increase shifts equilibrium toward the endothermic direction; decrease toward exothermic. Governs set-point selection and stability analysis in thermally regulated chemical reactors.
